mode-daily-desc: One shared puzzle a day. Same clothes for everyone — compete on the daily board.
mode-endless-desc: No timer. Keep sorting until the hampers overflow with mess.
mode-ranked-desc: Live multiplayer rooms. Same clothes, set round, highest score wins.
mode-time-attack-desc: Sort as many as you can before the timer runs out.
no-scores-yet: No scores yet. Be the first!
pick-a-mode: Pick a mode — drag the tumbling clothes into matching hampers. Chain sorts to ignite your streak!
same-clothes-hint: Everyone sorts the exact same clothes — highest score after the round wins.
sign-in-hint: Sign in to save scores and climb the leaderboards.
sign-in-to-save: Sign in to save your score
